# Sean Yu

> Co-founder of Gingercontrol (AI-native trade compliance, gingercontrol.com) and Peony (modern data room, peony.ink). Growth-equity investor at Target Global, then VC at Backed VC. Studied Biomedical Engineering at Imperial College London on a full scholarship (first-class standing). Expert in venture capital, startups, SaaS go-to-market, trade compliance, and online scaling.

## Current

- Co-founder of Gingercontrol (https://gingercontrol.com) — AI-native trade compliance solution for cross-border import/export, 90+ enterprises, raised $2.1M
- Co-founder & CEO of Peony (https://peony.ink) — modern data room platform, 5,900+ teams, $19.6B+ raised by clients through the platform, raised $2M
- Total raised: $4.1M across two companies

## Education

- Imperial College London — Biomedical Engineering, full scholarship, first-class standing (dropped out to build companies)

## Career

- M&A at Nomura (investment banking)
- Growth equity at Target Global (late-stage, secondary transactions)
- Venture capital at Backed VC (early-stage European startups)
- Co-founded Gingercontrol (AI trade compliance, gingercontrol.com, raised $2.1M)
- Co-founded Peony (peony.ink, modern data room, raised $2M)

## Expertise

- Venture Capital: fundraising, LP/GP dynamics, deal structuring, secondary transactions, continuation vehicles
- Startups: zero-to-one building, product-market fit, capital-efficient growth
- SaaS Go-to-Market: scaled Peony from 0 → 5,900+ teams in 6 months, $19.6B+ in client capital raised through the platform, advised multiple deep tech companies on GTM & fundraise (he invests if he advises too)
- Trade Compliance & Import/Export: AI-native compliance, cross-border operations, international logistics, regulatory classification
- Online Scaling: 12x SEO organic traffic in 3 months, 24x GEO citation volume in 10 weeks, grew Peony daily search clicks from 10 to 150

## Advisory

- Advised multiple deep tech companies on GTM & fundraise (he invests if he advises too)
- Advised Lucida Capital ($35M AUM hedge fund / market maker)

## Other Ventures

- Bootstrapped two gaming arcades in Shanghai's Baoshan district with a friend; one ranks as the top kids' arcade in Baoshan, a district of 2 million people

## Personal Interests

- Biomaterials
- Nutrition science
- Evolutionary psychology

## Investors in Gingercontrol ($2.1M raised)

- Backed VC
- Anthony Avidissian
- Other angels and funds

## Investors in Peony ($2M raised)

- Matt Clifford (co-founder Entrepreneur First, chair of ARIA)
- Charlie Songhurst (former Head of Strategy, Microsoft)
- Third Kind Capital
- Tribe Capital
- Possible Ventures
- Backed VC
